title: Event
description: An event represents something that happened at a given time interval. Events could be related to multiple assets.

id.description: A server-generated ID for the object.

externalId.description: The external ID provided by the client.

dataSetId.description: The ID of the dataset this event belongs to.

startTime.description: The number of milliseconds since epoch (start of the event).

endTime.description: The number of milliseconds since epoch (end of the event).

type.description: Type of the event, for example 'work_order' or 'alert'.

subtype.description: Subtype of the event, for example 'planned' or 'abnormal'.

metadata.description: Custom, application specific metadata. String key -> String value.

assetIds.description: Asset IDs of equipment that this event relates to.

createdTime.description: The number of milliseconds since epoch.

lastUpdatedTime.description: The number of milliseconds since epoch.
